summary: Matter Command Center is complete for the current view-layer product goal. It has a fixture-backed demo route, an adapter-backed matter-scoped route, professional agent cards, status filters, blocker/review/completed visibility, eval/workflow/artifact sections, route-aware artifact anchors, local-demo and live-matter navigation, and current desktop/mobile adapter-backed smoke coverage.
contractsChanged: AgentOps route Playwright assertions for adapter-backed route, eval workbench, gates, references, and matter-scoped artifact hrefs
testsRun: Playwright via system Chrome: /aletheia/agentops evidence artifact link href was /aletheia/agentops#artifact-evidence-item-evidence-notice-window and landed on the matching artifact queue entry

cd frontend && rm -rf .next-ui-smoke test-results/aletheia-ui-smoke-state.json && if [ -d test-results ]; then find test-results -maxdepth 1 -name 'aletheia-agentops-route-*' -exec rm -rf {} +; fi && npx playwright test tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium

cd frontend && rm -rf .next-ui-smoke test-results/aletheia-ui-smoke-state.json && if [ -d test-results ]; then find test-results -maxdepth 1 -name 'aletheia-agentops-route-*' -exec rm -rf {} +; fi && npx playwright test tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=mobile-chromium
risks: Matter Command Center remains a view-layer surface over existing Aletheia records; it is not a new persisted AgentOps source of truth.
Generic /aletheia/agentops is intentionally fixture-backed for the local demo; the product-truth path is /aletheia/matters/[matterId]/agentops.
Artifact links are route-aware hash anchors into the Command Center artifact queue until first-class matter artifact detail pages exist.
Desktop and mobile Chromium are covered; WebKit/Firefox are not part of this lane's acceptance evidence.
needs: Persistence owners should decide when GateResult, unresolved Big @ references, typed handoff provenance, eval snapshots, and export provenance become first-class persisted audit records.
Future artifact-detail routes can replace the current hash anchors without changing the card-to-artifact relationship model.
Downstream docs/release owners can now present /aletheia/matters/[matterId]/agentops as the adapter-backed reviewer path.
last_cycle_summary: Ran current desktop and mobile adapter-backed route smoke tests and marked the Matter Command Center lane done for the view-layer product goal.
features_added: Fixture-backed Matter Command Center route for deterministic demo review.
Adapter-backed matter-scoped Command Center route for persisted matter detail review.
Professional agent status cards for Intake, Evidence, Issue, Research, Risk, Memo, Review, Audit, and Eval.
All, Blocked, Review Needed, and Completed filters with counts.
Blocked reason, expert-attention, last-run, next-action, and related-artifact visibility.
Route-aware artifact anchors for fixture and matter-scoped routes.
Eval Workbench and skills loop summary inside the Command Center.
Navigation from local demo and remote matter workspaces into the Command Center.
tests_run: Playwright via system Chrome: /aletheia/agentops evidence artifact link href was /aletheia/agentops#artifact-evidence-item-evidence-notice-window and landed on the matching artifact queue entry

cd frontend && rm -rf .next-ui-smoke test-results/aletheia-ui-smoke-state.json && if [ -d test-results ]; then find test-results -maxdepth 1 -name 'aletheia-agentops-route-*' -exec rm -rf {} +; fi && npx playwright test tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=desktop-chromium

cd frontend && rm -rf .next-ui-smoke test-results/aletheia-ui-smoke-state.json && if [ -d test-results ]; then find test-results -maxdepth 1 -name 'aletheia-agentops-route-*' -exec rm -rf {} +; fi && npx playwright test tests/aletheia-agentops-route.spec.ts --project=mobile-chromium
next_actions: Persistence owners should promote accepted provenance records into first-class audit storage when schema ownership is ready.
Replace hash anchors with first-class artifact detail routes if those pages are added later.
